items.title: Footballers more likely to suffer depression and anxiety - study
items.summary: A new study finds evidence of reduced brain volume in former elite footballers, who also report difficulties with thinking skills and decision-making.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: 'He understands how to get through this' - Sarfaraz backs Masood to thrive without captaincy
